task_completion.visual_evidence: The gvSIG Desktop application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: The country polygons shapefile is loaded into the project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The layer 'ne_110m_admin_0_countries' (or similar) is visible in the Table of Contents (layers panel) and polygon features are displayed on the map view.

task_completion.description: The river lines shapefile is loaded into the project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The layer 'ne_110m_rivers_lake_centerlines' (or similar) is visible in the Table of Contents and line features are displayed on the map view.

task_completion.description: The geoprocessing tool for intersection is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A geoprocessing dialog (e.g., 'Intersection' or 'Geoprocessing Tools') is open in the gvSIG interface.

task_completion.description: The intersection tool is configured with the correct input layers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The geoprocessing dialog shows the countries and rivers layers selected as the input layers for the intersection operation.

task_completion.description: The output shapefile is configured to be saved to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The output file path '/home/ga/gvsig_data/exports/river_crossings.shp' is entered in the tool's output destination field, or a new layer named 'river_crossings' appears in the layers panel after execution.

integrity.description: Agent used the gvSIG GUI to perform the intersection.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with gvSIG menus and dialogs, rather than terminal commands (like ogr2ogr) or python scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual gvSIG application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The gvSIG interface is fully rendered with map views and standard UI elements, not a text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: The output was generated via the geoprocessing tool.
integrity.visual_evidence: The geoprocessing dialog is shown being configured or executing, rather than the output file just appearing or being copied via terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output path is exactly '/home/ga/gvsig_data/exports/river_crossings.shp'. The output must be a POINT or MultiPoint geometry shapefile containing at least 5 features (actual intersection yields 36+ points).
